title: KickAFK
description: Kicks afk people to a specified server to reduce people using afking to get stuff overnight
body:
**KickAFK: Optimize Your Velocity Network by Managing Idle Players**
**
Plugin Description**

KickAFK is a powerful resource optimization solution for Minecraft networks running on the Velocity proxy. This lightweight plugin automatically detects players who have been inactive for a configurable period and seamlessly redirects them to a specified fallback server, typically a lobby or AFK area.
Key Features

**Intelligent AFK Detection**: Monitors player activity through chat messages, commands, and server switching to accurately identify truly idle players

**Customizable Timeout**: Set your preferred inactivity threshold before players are considered AFK (default: 2 minutes)

Flexible Redirection: Configure any server in your network as the fallback destination for idle players

Permission-Based Bypass: VIP players or staff can be exempted from AFK redirection with the "kickafk.bypass" permission

Player Notifications: Optional warnings to inform players before they're redirected

Resource-Friendly: Lightweight implementation with minimal performance impact

Easy Configuration: Simple TOML config file with detailed comments for each option

Debug Mode: Optional logging for troubleshooting and configuration verification

**Why Choose This Plugin?**

Network administrators face the challenge of optimizing server resources while maintaining a smooth player experience. This plugin addresses that challenge directly by:

Freeing up valuable slots on premium gameplay servers for active players

Reducing server load by moving idle players to lightweight lobby servers

Improving overall network performance by balancing player distribution

Enhancing player experience through better resource allocation

Perfect for networks of any size, from small communities to large public servers, this tool gives administrators precise control over how inactive players impact server resources.
**
Designed for Velocity**

Built specifically for the Velocity proxy platform, the plugin integrates seamlessly with your existing server infrastructure. Its efficient design ensures minimal overhead while providing maximum functionality for managing idle players across your entire network.

**Installation & Setup**

Simply drop the JAR file into your Velocity plugins folder, restart the proxy, and configure the config.toml file to your preferences. The plugin works out of the box with sensible defaults but can be fully customized to suit your specific network requirements.

Start optimizing your network resources today by implementing this elegant solution for managing AFK players!
